wine_retailers.name: Vinothek der Moselland eG
wine_retailers.description: Retail vinothek beside the head office of the Moselland eG winegrowers' cooperative, the largest in the region. Sells the cooperative's own wines from the Mosel, Nahe, Pfalz and Rheinhessen.
wine_retailers.speciality: Cooperative Mosel Riesling and Sekt, plus Nahe, Pfalz and Rheinhessen ranges

wine_retailers.name: Das Weinhaus Trier
wine_retailers.description: Family-run wine shop and restaurant in central Trier holding what it calls the largest selection of Mosel, Saar and Ruwer wines in the city, at winery prices, plus international bottles.
wine_retailers.speciality: Mosel, Saar and Ruwer wines from across the region at estate prices

wine_retailers.name: dieMOSEL Weinhandlung
wine_retailers.description: Wine shop in a heritage 1890 wine-merchant villa on the Traben-Trarbach riverbank, stocking over 200 wines from across the whole Mosel region, with an attached vinothek and bar.
wine_retailers.speciality: Curated Mosel range of over 200 wines from small and well-known growers

wine_retailers.name: Gebrueder Weber Weinhandel
wine_retailers.description: Long-established Trier wine merchant with retail and wholesale arms, selling Mosel wines alongside ranges from France, Italy, Austria, Portugal and Spain from its Olewig house of wines.
wine_retailers.speciality: Mosel wines plus a broad European range; retail and wholesale

wine_retailers.name: Beth's Weinladen
wine_retailers.description: Estate wine shop of Weinhaus Beth in Kroev, selling the family's Mosel Rieslings, reds and Sekt alongside its own fruit brandies and liqueurs from generations of winemaking and distilling.
wine_retailers.speciality: Estate Mosel Riesling, Kroever Nacktarsch, Sekt and house Edelbrand
